description: API to retrieve short interest for a given ticker on a given exchange This API provides the raw number of shares estimated to be shorted, the widely used short-interest percentage of free float, the number of shares available to trade, and the USD value of the estimated short position. Available Data Points: Date: Date for the short interest data. (YYYY-MM-DD format). Short Interest Percentage of Free Float: Short interest estimate as % of free float. Short Interest Shares: Short interest estimate in number of shares. Short Interest USD: USD value (shortInterestShares * closing price). Try it out! You can test the API with the trial key TEST. Simply include it in your request headers; either here, or add the header "Ortex-Api-Key": "TEST" to your http request. Trial key restrictions: A list of randomly selected rows will be returned Get full access! Get a key at app.ortex.com/apis
